records.question: Who are the users named Iron Man with email ts@richest.com, at least 6662425 followers, partition ID of at least 1, who tweeted "Hello I'm Tony Stark." on or after 2018-03-09 20:00:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' AND user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 6662425 AND tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' and user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' and user_profiles.followers >= 6662425 and user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 and tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.' and tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14' limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter user_profiles by name, email, followers, and partitionid, then join with tweets to check for specific tweet text and date. All conditions must be met simultaneously.

records.question: Which user profiles have the name Susan?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.name = 'Susan'
records.pred_sql: select uid from user_profiles where lower(name) like '%susan%' limit 5
records.thought: This is a simple query on the user_profiles table filtering by the name column. Since we're looking for exact name 'Susan', we'll use a case-insensitive like pattern to match the name.

records.question: Which user profiles have the email ts@richest.com and the name Iron Man, with at least partitionid 1 and exactly 6662425 followers, who tweeted "My company is hiring interns." on 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' AND tweets.text = 'My company is hiring interns.' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 AND tweets.createdate = '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND user_profiles.followers = 6662425
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' and user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' and user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 and user_profiles.followers = 6662425 and tweets.text = 'My company is hiring interns.' and tweets.createdate = '2018-03-12 02:30:30' limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter user_profiles by exact email, name, partitionid (>=1), and followers (=6662425), then join with tweets to check for the specific tweet text and timestamp. All conditions must match simultaneously.

records.question: Which user profiles have a partition ID of at most 5, an email of np@superstar.com, at least 94375428 followers, and a name exactly Natalie Portman?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid <= 5 AND user_profiles.email = 'np@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 94375428 AND user_profiles.name = 'Natalie Portman'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where user_profiles.partitionid <= 5 and user_profiles.email = 'np@superstar.com' and user_profiles.followers >= 94375428 and user_profiles.name = 'Natalie Portman' limit 5
records.thought: This query filters user_profiles by four specific conditions: partitionid <= 5, exact email match, followers >= 94375428, and exact name match. All conditions are on the user_profiles table, so no joins are needed.

records.question: Who are the users with the email cd@superstar.com that have posted tweets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
records.pred_sql: select distinct user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find users with email 'cd@superstar.com' who have posted tweets. This requires joining user_profiles with tweets table on uid, filtering by the exact email address.

records.question: Which user profiles belong exactly to partition 2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid = 2
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where partitionid = 2 limit 5
records.thought: The question asks for user profiles in partition 2. Since partitionid is a direct column in user_profiles, we can query it directly with an equality condition on partitionid = 2.

records.question: Which user profiles have the email exactly bw@superhero.com with no more than 35425845 followers and a partition ID at most 23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'bw@superhero.com' AND user_profiles.followers <= 35425845 AND user_profiles.partitionid <= 23
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where email = 'bw@superhero.com' and followers <= 35425845 and partitionid <= 23 limit 5
records.thought: This query filters user_profiles by three exact conditions: email equals 'bw@superhero.com', followers <= 35425845, and partitionid <= 23. No joins needed since all conditions are on the target table.

records.question: Which user profiles have at least 23927492 followers, belong to partition 5, have the email cd@superstar.com, and tweeted exactly "I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers >= 23927492 AND user_profiles.partitionid = 5 AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles inner join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where user_profiles.followers >= 23927492 and user_profiles.partitionid = 5 and user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' and tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter user_profiles by followers >= 23927492, partitionid = 5, and email = 'cd@superstar.com', then join with tweets to find users who tweeted the exact text. Using inner join on tweets table to match the exact tweet text.

records.question: What user profiles have the name Celine Dion, the email cd@superstar.com, and at least 23927492 followers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion' AND user_profiles.followers >= 23927492
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where name = 'Celine Dion' and email = 'cd@superstar.com' and followers >= 23927492 limit 5
records.thought: This is a straightforward query on user_profiles table filtering by exact name, exact email, and a minimum follower count. No joins needed since all conditions are on the target table.

records.question: Which user profiles have tweets created on or after 2018-03-09 20:00:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14'
records.pred_sql: select distinct user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14' limit 5
records.thought: Need to join user_profiles with tweets table to filter users who have tweets on or after the specified date, then return the user profile UIDs.
